name: Pickled Okra or Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Use small okra or corn. Pick corn when it is 2-3 inches long and no kernels have formed yet.
2. Wash well.
3. Soak in ice water for 1 hour per pint.
4. Pack into pint jars.
5. Mix together dry seasonings: red pepper, mustard seed, salt (not iodized), dill seed.
6. In an enameled or glass saucepan, mix vinegar and water, then bring to a boil.
7. Pour the boiling mixture over the okra or corn, covering all.
8. Seal the jars.
9. Store for 2-3 weeks to allow them to pickle properly.
